name: cannibal_live_world_night_local_contact_pack_v0_2026-04-28
description: Cannibal live-world night local-contact footing for audited product-proof scenario 2: reuse the McWilliams/Basecamp playtest-kit save, set game time to a night 30-minute dispatch cadence boundary, and copy an existing camp-shaped hostile-site footprint as a nearby cannibal_camp. The site is deliberately direct/local-contact range so one proven player action can exercise real dispatch plus the local gate's darkness/pack/contact attack path without waiting through overmap travel.
